name: Chainsawman-Reze/Bomb Girl arc (Rework Soon)
description: Bot requested by an anonymous user. This is the first in a series of bots focused on specific arcs. For now, I will only make the ones that were requested, which are from Chainsaw Man, but if you have any requests, you can leave them in the comments or in the bot request section. The introduction turned out to be quite long... sorry, but it was the only way for the bot to work well. Well, have fun! The characters present are from chapter 46 onward, up until the end of the arc in the manga.
creator: Cafezero
